resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def isPrefixString(self, s: str, words: List[str]) -> bool:
        prefix = ''
        for word in words:
            prefix += word
            if prefix == s:
                return True
            if len(prefix) > len(s):
                return False
        return False
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates through the words array, concatenating each word to the prefix string. It checks if the prefix string is equal to the input string s. If it is, it returns True. If the length of the prefix string exceeds the length of s, it returns False. This approach has a high efficiency as it only iterates through the words array once and uses a constant amount of space.
